Soil/Rock Description: Rounded and sub-rounded COBBLES, fine to coarse GRAVEL and CONCRETE. No recovery, assumed finer material washed out. (FILL)
Rounded and sub-rounded COBBLES and fine to coarse GRAVEL. No recovery, assumed finer material washed out. (FILL)

Moderately weak, brownish grey spotted yellow, highly decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with extremely closely spaced, moderately narrow to narrow, rough undulating, limonite and manganese stained joints, dipping 15°-35°.

Moderately strong, brownish grey spotted yellow, moderately decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely to extremely closely spaced, narrow to very narrow, rough undulating, limonite and manganese stained joints, dipping 5°-10° and 15°-35°.
